name: AS Silvano Fashion Group
summary: AS Silvano Fashion Group designs, manufactures, distributes, and retails women's lingerie. The company sells its lingerie, beachwear, and underwear products under the Milavitsa, Lauma Lingerie, Alisee, Aveline, Laumelle, and Hidalgo brands through wholesale channel and franchised sales, as well as through Milavitsa and Lauma Lingerie retail stores. It also offers logistics services. As of December 31, 2019, the company had 666 branded stores, including 628 Milavitsa and 38 Lauma Lingerie stores, which include 556 franchise and 86 Group 110 operated retail stores in Russia, Belarus, Ukraine, the Baltics, and internationally. AS Silvano Fashion Group was founded in 1908 and is based in Tallinn, Estonia.
